---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "kinsongao-bit"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

## Storm Counts by Type per Year

```{r storm-plot}
storms %>%
  filter(status %in% c("tropical depression", "tropical storm", "hurricane")) %>%
  distinct(year, name, status) %>%
  count(year, status) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, fill = status)) +
  geom_area(position = "stack", alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "tropical depression" = "#ADD8E6",
      "tropical storm" = "#FFA500",
      "hurricane" = "#8B0000"
    ),
    name = "Storm Type"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Storm Counts by Type per Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Storms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
